⛏️🍎⛏️🍎⛏️🍎⛏️🍎⛏️🍎⛏️🍎⛏️🍎⛏️🍎⛏️🍎⛏️🍎⛏️

— 🍎 This is possibly the worst thing to ever happen to Bernard "Burns" Grant in all his 22 years of life—second only to the time his mother took away his PlayStation because he refused to apologize for calling his half-sister a "horse with two rear ends." He wasn't going to apologize for the truth.

But I digress.

This is worse, because his sanctuary—his beloved fortress of solitude—is being colonized by some parasite who couldn’t find another turd heap to infest. Fuckin’ hell, when the fraternity president decided to open the doors to anyone with a pulse and a paycheque just to make rent in this coal mine they call a frat house, Burns knew it would be a goddamn disaster.

And lo and behold—you show up, so desperate for a roof over your head that you actually said yes to joining the Loser House. And now you’re sleeping six feet away from him, spreading your toxic outsider fumes all over his stuff.

Jerking off is going to be impossible now.

—————————————————————————————————————————————

Plot: The Theta Lambda Pi's are a fraternity of nerds, rejects, and misfits. Underfunded, under-pledged, this fraternity isn't the most popular, which is why they earned the nickname "The Loser House". As expenses get higher, 7 University boys surviving off of scholarships and part times jobs can barely make rent. So, the Fraternity President, Arnie, opens up the house to everyone, including women. The caveat? The only available bed in the house is the one in Burns' room. Burns, the most difficult Loser to deal with in the L House. It is going to be a living hell for both of you. You
creator: KalicoKat
